bead.title: repo-structure: extract quota, burn-rate, status, and snapshot mechanics: part 3
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Parent bead fizeau-3d470c63 is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 3 of 3 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
Provider quota state, subscription quota status, burn-rate prediction, service status aggregation, and snapshot autorouting mechanics still live in the root facade even though ADR-008 names `internal/quota` as the implementation home for quota mechanics.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
`docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-008-service-package-and-transcript-boundaries.md:43-64` requires concrete mechanics to move behind internal packages. `service.go:18-39` defines stable public service methods while quota/status implementation remains in `provider_burn_rate.go:1`, `provider_quota_state.go:1`, `service_subscription_quota.go:1`, `service_status.go:1`, and `service_snapshot.go:1`.

PROPOSED FIX
Move quota window state, most-constrained-window calculations, burn-rate prediction, subscription quota aggregation, status projection helpers, and snapshot autorouting implementation into `internal/quota` and adjacent internal helpers as needed. Keep public quota/status structs, root constructor methods, and JSON projections stable.

NON-SCOPE
Do not extract provider/model listing surfaces (`ListModels`, `ListProviders`, `HealthCheck`) except for adapter touch needed to keep compilation green. Do not refresh website docs or changelog in this slice beyond incidental references needed by tests.

GOVERNING ARTIFACT / DEPENDENCY
Governing artifact: ADR-008 (`spec:ADR-008`). Parent bead/dependency: `fizeau-cd9af16b`.

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- Internal quota tests pass: `go test ./internal/quota/... -count=1`.
- Full repository gate passes: `go test ./... -count=1`.
- Hook gate passes: `lefthook run pre-commit`.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it.
bead.acceptance:
1. Internal quota tests pass: `go test ./internal/quota/... -count=1`.
2. Full repository gate passes: `go test ./... -count=1`.
3. Hook gate passes: `lefthook run pre-commit`.
